_comment_bash_inspection: Inspect Bash commands for references to ignored paths. Turn off to only guard the structured file tools.
_comment_filter_search_results: Strip ignored paths out of Grep/Glob results instead of letting them through.
_comment_use_global_ignore: Also apply ~/.claude/.claudeignore, matched against absolute paths anywhere on the machine.
_comment_announce_on_session_start: Tell Claude the active patterns at session start so it does not discover them one denial at a time.
_comment_on_error: deny = fail closed if an ignore file exists but cannot be evaluated; allow = fail open.
_comment_audit_log: Append a JSONL entry for every denial and every filtered result.
